name: ai_marketing_claude_prompts
description: Reusable prompt pack derived from the ai_marketing_claude capability.

prompts.name: website_audit_prompt
prompts.template: Audit the website at {website_url} and identify key marketing strengths, weaknesses, and opportunities.
prompts.use_case: Performing detailed marketing audits of client websites

prompts.name: copy_generation_prompt
prompts.template: Generate engaging marketing copy based on the following brief: {marketing_brief}
prompts.use_case: Generating creative marketing copy and email sequences automatically

prompts.name: email_sequence_prompt
prompts.template: Create an email marketing sequence based on these subject lines: {email_subjects}
prompts.use_case: Planning and preparing digital ad campaigns using AI assistance

prompts.name: ad_campaign_prompt
prompts.template: Develop a detailed ad campaign plan for this target audience and budget: {ad_campaign_parameters}
prompts.use_case: Creating organized content calendars for social media and blogs

prompts.name: content_calendar_prompt
prompts.template: Create a content calendar meeting these requirements: {content_calendar_requirements}
prompts.use_case: Conducting competitive intelligence for market positioning

prompts.name: competitive_intelligence_prompt
prompts.template: Analyze the competitive landscape given this data: {competitive_intelligence_input}
prompts.use_case: Producing professional marketing reports for clients
